_shorthelp: GridColumn Adds a column to a GridRow. Bootstrap.

_size-xs.desc: Size of column in extra small layout. Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-sm.desc: Size of column in small layout. Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-md.desc: Size of column in medium layout. Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.

_size-lg.desc: Size of column in large layout. Total for all Grid Columns should add up to 12.
